title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Lenskart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Lenskart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lenskart family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!
